message:
fix(provider/codex): isolate HOME directory for Codex profiles
fix(health): prevent unsafe system ADC fallback in ParseGeminiExpiry

- internal/provider/codex: create 'home' directory and set HOME env var to enable passthrough symlinks (git, ssh) in isolated profiles.
- internal/health: restrict ParseGeminiExpiry to only check system ADC if no authDir is provided; improve ADC path resolution for Windows/CLOUDSDK_CONFIG.
- Tests updated to verify new behaviors.
